---
title: "Synthetic F30 Fellowship Application Draft"
author: "Allie Gator"
---

<!-- ============================================================ -->
```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\vspace*{3cm}
{\Huge\bfseries F30 Fellowship Application Draft}\\[1cm]
{\Large Allie Gator}\\[0.5cm]
{\large University of Florida}\\[2cm]
{\normalsize Synthetic public template}
\vspace*{2cm}
\end{center}
\newpage
```

<!-- COVER LETTER -->
{{< include markdown/Cover_Letter.md >}}

\newpage

<!-- R&R OTHER PROJECT INFORMATION -->
```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\vspace*{4cm}
{\LARGE\bfseries R\&R Other Project Information}\\[1cm]
{\normalsize Project Summary/Abstract $\bullet$ Project Narrative $\bullet$ References}\\
{\normalsize Facilities \& Other Resources $\bullet$ Equipment}
\vspace*{3cm}
\end{center}
\newpage
```

{{< include markdown/Summary_Abstract.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include markdown/Project_Narrative.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include markdown/10_Facilities_and_Other_Resources.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include markdown/11_Equipment.md >}}

\newpage

<!-- SENIOR/KEY PERSON PROFILE -->
```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\vspace*{4cm}
{\LARGE\bfseries Senior/Key Person Profile}\\[1cm]
{\normalsize Biosketch source notes are maintained in biosketches/}
\vspace*{3cm}
\end{center}
\newpage
```

{{< include biosketches/allie_gator_biosketch.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include biosketches/charles_hermite_biosketch.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include biosketches/emmy_noether_biosketch.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include biosketches/subrahmanyan_chandrasekhar_biosketch.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include biosketches/joseph_louis_lagrange_biosketch.md >}}

\newpage

<!-- PHS FELLOWSHIP SUPPLEMENTAL -->
```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\vspace*{4cm}
{\LARGE\bfseries PHS Fellowship Supplemental}\\[1cm]
{\normalsize Candidate $\bullet$ Training Activities \& Timeline $\bullet$ Specific Aims}\\
{\normalsize Research Strategy $\bullet$ RCR $\bullet$ Sponsor Commitment $\bullet$ Letters of Support}
\vspace*{3cm}
\end{center}
\newpage
```

{{< include markdown/2_Candidate.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include markdown/3_3_Training_Activities_and_Timeline.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include markdown/3_4_Specific_Aims.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include markdown/3_5_Research_Strategy.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include markdown/3_7_RCR.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include markdown/4_8_Sponsor_Commitment.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include markdown/4_9_Letters_of_Support.md >}}

\newpage

::: {#refs}
:::
